languages.text: "Почему техножречество позволяет тебе работать вместе с ними? Разве аугменты не их вотчина?"
"Why do the Tech-Priests permit you to work alongside them? Augmetics are their preserve, are they not?"
languages.original_text: "Почему техножречество позволяет тебе работать вместе с ними? Разве аугменты не их вотчина?"

traits.locale_text: "Why do the Tech-Priests permit you to work alongside them? Augmetics are their preserve, are they not?"
"Why do the Tech-Priests permit you to work alongside them? Augmetics are their preserve, are they not?"
"Why do the Tech-Priests permit you to work alongside them? Augmetics are their preserve, are they not?"
"Why do the Tech-Priests permit you to work with augmetics? To my knowledge, one must be initiated into the mysteries of the Adeptus Mechanicus."
"Why do the Tech-Priests permit you to work with augmetics? To my knowledge, one must be initiated into the mysteries of the Adeptus Mechanicus."

languages.text: "Warum erlauben Euch die Techpriester die Arbeit mit Augmentationen? Meines Wissens muss man in dazu in die Mysterien des Adeptus Mechanicus eingeweiht sein."
languages.original_text: "Why do the Tech-Priests permit you to work with augmetics? To my knowledge, one must be initiated into the mysteries of the Adeptus Mechanicus."

traits.locale_text: "Warum erlauben Euch die Techpriester die Arbeit mit Augmentationen? Meines Wissens muss man in dazu in die Mysterien des Adeptus Mechanicus eingeweiht sein."

languages.text: « Pourquoi les technoprêtres vous autorisent-ils à travailler avec des augmétiques ? À ma connaissance, l'on doit d'abord s'initier aux mystères de l'Adeptus Mechanicus. »
languages.original_text: "Why do the Tech-Priests permit you to work with augmetics? To my knowledge, one must be initiated into the mysteries of the Adeptus Mechanicus."

traits.locale_text: « Pourquoi les technoprêtres vous autorisent-ils à travailler avec des augmétiques ? À ma connaissance, l'on doit d'abord s'initier aux mystères de l'Adeptus Mechanicus. »

languages.text: “技术神甫们怎么会允许你执行植入物手术？据我所知，必须接受机械修会的启蒙仪式才有这个资格。”
languages.original_text: "Why do the Tech-Priests permit you to work with augmetics? To my knowledge, one must be initiated into the mysteries of the Adeptus Mechanicus."

traits.locale_text: “技术神甫们怎么会允许你执行植入物手术？据我所知，必须接受机械修会的启蒙仪式才有这个资格。”

languages.text: «¿Por qué le permiten los tecnosacerdotes trabajar con auméticos? Tengo entendido que es necesario haberse iniciado en los misterios del Adeptus Mechanicus para esa labor».
languages.original_text: "Why do the Tech-Priests permit you to work with augmetics? To my knowledge, one must be initiated into the mysteries of the Adeptus Mechanicus."

traits.locale_text: «¿Por qué le permiten los tecnosacerdotes trabajar con auméticos? Tengo entendido que es necesario haberse iniciado en los misterios del Adeptus Mechanicus para esa labor».

languages.text: 「なぜ技術司祭たちは、君が彼らと並んで働くことを許しているのですか？オーグメティックは彼らの専権事項なのではないですか？」
languages.original_text: "Why do the Tech-Priests permit you to work alongside them? Augmetics are their preserve, are they not?"

traits.locale_text: 「なぜ技術司祭たちは、君が彼らと並んで働くことを許しているのですか？オーグメティックは彼らの専権事項なのではないですか？」

languages.text: "Tekno Rahipler neden ogmetiklerle çalışmanıza izin veriyor? Bildiğim kadarıyla bunun için Adeptus Mechanicus'un gizemlerini biliyor olmak gerekir."
languages.original_text: "Why do the Tech-Priests permit you to work with augmetics? To my knowledge, one must be initiated into the mysteries of the Adeptus Mechanicus."

traits.locale_text: "Tekno Rahipler neden ogmetiklerle çalışmanıza izin veriyor? Bildiğim kadarıyla bunun için Adeptus Mechanicus'un gizemlerini biliyor olmak gerekir."
